Generated Narrative: CodeSystem v2-0940

Properties

This code system defines the following properties for its concepts

NameCodeURITypeDescription
Statusstatushttp://hl7.org/fhir/concept-properties#statuscodeA code that indicates the status of the concept
deprecatedv2-table-deprecatedhttp://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/utg-concept-properties#v2-table-deprecatedcodeVersion of HL7 in which the code was deprecated

Concepts

This case-sensitive code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0940 defines the following codes in a Is-A hierarchy:

CodeDisplayDefinitionStatus
LCP Limited Coverage PolicyLimited Coverage Policyactive
NFDA Non-FDA Approved Diagnositic ProcedureNon-FDA Approved Diagnositic Procedureactive
FLDP Frequency Limited Diagnostics ProcedureFrequency Limited Diagnostics Procedureactive
NT New Test - Limited Diagnostic HistoryNew Test - Limited Diagnostic Historyactive

name: LimitationTypeCode
title: limitationTypeCode
description: HL7-defined code system of concepts specifying the type of limitation.  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the DPS segment.
purpose: Underlying Master Code System for V2 table 0940 (Limitation Type Codes)
